services.title: Cross Platform with WebGL
services.description: The right way to build apps – with immediate and long-term savings on development and maintenance costs. Develop for all platforms from a single codebase – Android, iPhone, all browser types, SmartTV, social networks, and more.

services.title: Powerful 3D User Experience
services.description: Game and 3D applications are a powerful draw for users. More than any regular web page or app, 3D creates an immersive user experience and strong interaction that keeps users coming back.

services.title: One Vision
services.description: OneCode offers full business development support to get the most out of your app investment. This includes preparing a business plan, building an investor presentation, specification writing, and planning and executing marketing campaigns.

specializations.title: WebGL
specializations.description: WebGL is a JavaScript API that enables the development of applications with complex, three-dimensional (3D) graphics in the browser without installing a plug-in. WebGL makes possible in browsers today what was once exclusive to gaming consoles. You can develop a sophisticated 3D app in a single codebase that runs on desktop, mobile, and smart TV browsers.

specializations.title: HTML5
specializations.description: HTML5 is increasingly establishing itself as the standard, central code for internet applications – and even for applications outside the internet. The latest iteration of HTML lets us create rich, advanced environments that work on every platform.

specializations.title: PhoneGap
specializations.description: PhoneGap enables the creation of applications for any device – iPhone, Android, Windows Mobile, and more – that would otherwise require different environments and languages. PhoneGap solves the complexity by using web technologies that comply with open standards. It allows you to develop once for both the web and as a downloadable app from the app store.

specializations.title: Unity3D
specializations.description: Unity3D enables the development of applications for mobile and desktop from a single codebase using the most advanced tools on the market. OneCode's capabilities in graphics and 3D take Unity3D as far as it can go.

portfolioCategories.title: 3D Applications
portfolioCategories.description: Applications that incorporate 3D are today the most powerful tool for capturing users' attention over time, and an excellent means for visualizing products and creating advanced learning environments.

portfolioCategories.title: Cross Platform Development
portfolioCategories.description: Cross-platform development best meets the need to provide users with a consistent experience on mobile devices, personal computers, and everywhere else.

portfolioCategories.title: Mobile Applications
portfolioCategories.description: Cross-platform development best meets the need to provide users with a consistent experience on mobile devices, personal computers, and everywhere else.

portfolioCategories.title: Game Development
portfolioCategories.description: Computer games are powerful tools for marketing, conveying messages, and generating revenue. But not just any game! OneCode knows what it takes to put the right elements into your game.

portfolioCategories.title: HTML5 & WebGL Development
portfolioCategories.description: Computer games are powerful tools for marketing, conveying messages, and generating revenue. But not just any game! OneCode knows what it takes to put the right elements into your game.

projects.title: Promotional Mini-Game for the PAZAM App
projects.description: Development of a marketing mini-game as part of a product promotion campaign within the PAZAM app for soldiers. The game is built on OneCode's game engine, enabling rapid development for advertising, marketing, and branding needs.

projects.title: Word Puzzle Game Engine
projects.description: An engine for creating word games. The player must find the correct word under a time limit by dragging letters to the appropriate position in the word.

projects.title: KKL 2018 Quiz App – Zionism, People, Environment
projects.description: Development of a quiz game app on the topics of Zionism, people, and the environment. The app is designed to help students prepare for the KKL quiz and school exam.

projects.title: TAP Engine Development
projects.description: Development of a TAP engine for game applications – allowing various items to move in a certain direction while the player's goal is to prevent them from reaching their destination.

projects.title: Running Monkey Game
projects.description: A RUNNER game engine that allows the player to collect good items that fall on them, accumulating points while dodging obstacles.

projects.title: Plane Obstacle Mini-Game – in the PAZAM App
projects.description: Development of a mini-game for the PAZAM soldiers' app. Participants earn points, enter a weekly ranking, and win prizes.

projects.title: Unity Game: Don't Wake Papa
projects.description: Don't Wake Papa – a Unity-based game application for Android and iOS devices. The game challenges the player's reaction speed.

projects.title: Three Games for Baby TV
projects.description: Development of three games for the Baby TV channel.

projects.title: Roll Out – Mini-Game in the PAZAM App
projects.description: Roll Out – a mini-game in the PAZAM mobile app. Players can accumulate points and win various prizes suited for soldiers.

projects.title: Real-Time 3D Virtual Exhibition for Medium
projects.description: A 3D virtual exhibition, the first of its kind operating in all browsers and on all devices, with high performance and no need to install plug-ins.

projects.title: The Labyrinth – Strategic Game
projects.description: Development of a game for building and exploring labyrinths in WebGL. Cross Platform with fast load times.

projects.title: Don't Wake Papa Mobile Game
projects.description: A new game that combines timing ability, quick response, concentration, and competitiveness. The goal of the game is to not wake Papa.

projects.title: Tridshops – 3D Social Shopping Platform
projects.description: A platform that enables setting up and managing a three-dimensional virtual store, in which the consumer can browse in real time as if in a physical store.

projects.title: Converting KKL App from Flash to HTML5
projects.description: Converting a KKL application from Flash to HTML5 on the subject of Knowledge of the Land. The migration enabled a better user experience and higher compatibility.

projects.title: VIVA DIAMONDS Game Development
projects.description: Development of a game for Playfriend777, combining a word challenge with coordination abilities to create a unique gameplay style.

projects.title: EduMetrix Virtual Educational Environment
projects.description: A virtual world containing dozens of learning objects, some incorporating OneCode's unique 3D technology.

teamMembers.name: Keren Brown Tsamir
teamMembers.bio: With the broad vision of a CEO, the attention to detail of a lawyer, and the multitasking abilities of a mother of two – she leads the OneCode OneVision vision that has guided the company since its founding.

teamMembers.name: Ronen "Ranger" Tsamir
teamMembers.bio: Armed with peripheral vision and binoculars for long-range scouting, and after conducting a full terrain mapping and selecting the most suitable tools – precisely matching the project's needs and business activity – he leads projects safely to completion.
